message.errorPopupBlocked: The sign-in popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
message.errorNetworkFailed: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
message.errorUnauthorizedDomain: This domain isn't authorised for sign-in.
message.errorAccountExists: An account already exists with a different sign-in method.
message.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again later.
